hard_rules: Simulator work units must run the simulator and collect real images or render frames into observations/.
A zero-image or zero-render-frame acquisition attempt is not a terminal state and cannot produce DONE.json or BLOCKED.json; it must retry until at least one real image is present.
media_manifest.jsonl must contain at least one simulator image/video-frame record with a workspace path to a non-empty decodable file.
Placeholder media, historical cache, hand-written media manifests, model hallucinations, and unexecuted sample outputs cannot satisfy data_16.
